channel.title: Projects on Samridh Anand
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Samridh Anand

item.title: Early Speed Breaker Detection
item.description: A crowdsourced IoT solution to reduce road accidents by providing advance warnings about speed breakers and potholes while creating a comprehensive database of road hazards

item.title: Pay via Fingerprint
item.description: A biometric payment system for campus transactions using fingerprint authentication, developed as part of the Microprocessors and Computer Architecture course (UE21CS251B)

item.title: A Multi-Agent RAG Framework for Automated Source Code Vulnerability Detection and Repair
item.description: A novel AI-powered system leveraging multiple LLM agents and Retrieval Augmented Generation for comprehensive vulnerability detection and automated repair in source code

item.title: GOSniff
item.description: A network packet analyzer written in Go with real-time web-based visualization

item.title: Mock Stock Trading Application
item.description: A stock market simulation platform using historical data and virtual currency for risk-free trading practice

item.title: Online Portal for University Students
item.description: A comprehensive university portal system developed using software engineering best practices and collaborative development methodologies

item.title: Food Supply Chain
item.description: A blockchain-based solution for the food industry supply chain, enhancing transparency and traceability through decentralization
